title: 单词牌
description:
Vocab Rush is a unique deck-building game where you explore and combine your cards to unleash powerful effects, defeat a variety of interesting opponents, English words are naturally integrated into gameplay and become part of your strategy.

Your starter deck includes Clover, Magnet, Golden Key, and three types of colored Gem cards.

A rich variety of hand types, including hidden combinations

Use your basic cards to build powerful combinations and achieve high scores.

From single-card hands to six-card combinations, some hidden hand types can only be discovered through bold and creative deck-building.

Skill-based equipment and strategic items

Use equipment cards with diverse abilities to greatly enhance your deck, achieve exponential score growth, and unleash thrilling combo chains to defeat your opponents.

In addition, you’ll have access to even more card types—such as Talent cards, Grammar cards, Proverb cards, and Slang cards. Making good use of these will help you go even further.

Break the boundaries of the game

Flexibly combine a wide range of powerful tools—different decks, Equipment cards, Talent cards, Grammar cards, Proverb cards, and Slang cards. Use these versatile elements to ignite combo frenzies and supercharge your hands with thrilling, adrenaline-pumping boosts.

• 150 Equipment cards, each with unique abilities

• 8 different hand attributes, each influencing gameplay and strategy

• 15 distinct decks, representing different playstyles and approaches

• Each Equipment card has 5 potential variants, granting additional abilities

• 22 types of Grammar card variants to enhance your hands

• 15 Proverb cards to strengthen your combinations

• 18 Slang cards, each with mysterious powers and unique uses

• 32 Talent attributes that provide lasting boosts for the current run
description_short: A combo-driven deckbuilder inspired by poker-style hand building. Build powerful decks, unleash explosive combos, and challenge unique opponents. Discover diverse hands, equipment, and hidden mechanics while chasing huge scores.
